sections.paragraph:
pl. יְהוּדִים, sometimes יְהוּדִיִּים Est 4:7 8:1 , , 13 9:15 , 18 , in כתיב-

(1) Gent. noun, a Jew-(a) one who belonged to the kingdom of Judah, 2Ki 16:6 25:25 .-(b) in the later Hebrew, after the carrying away of the ten tribes, it was applied to any Israelite, Jer 32:12 38:19 40:11 43:9 especially 34:9 (Syn. עִבְרִי). Neh 1:2 3:33 4:6 Est 2:5 3:4 5:13 . Fem. יְהוּדִיָּה 1Ch 4:18.

(2) [Jehudi], pr.n. m. Jer 36:14, 21 Jer 36:21.
